TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1967 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 27 a romi'ad masofoc ci Willem-Alexander, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Netherlands anini i ci Willem-Alexander, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 30 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i wi…æ…æ…ôm-a…æ…ôxan…¨~…Æ…ôr, ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u n…ôtƒß…ôr…æan…¨~…Æs anini i ¶i wi…æ…æ…ôm-a…æ…ôxan…¨~…Æ…ôr, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
S.FORM: I 1967 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 27 a romi'ad masofoc ci Willem-Alexander, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Netherlands anini i ci Willem-Alexander, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 30 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i wi…æ…æ…ôm-a…æ…ôxan…¨~…Æ…ôr, ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u n…ôtƒß…ôr…æan…¨~…Æs anini i ¶i wi…æ…æ…ôm-a…æ…ôxan…¨~…Æ…ôr, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
